questionHtml:
In the following unbalanced equation, X represents an element.

Which oxide reacts with water as shown?

____ + H2O → X(OH)2

A.  Na2O

B.  MgO

C.  NO2

D.  SO3

meta.title: In the following unbalanced equation, X represents an element. Which oxide reacts with water as shown? ____ + H2O → X(OH)2 A. Na2O B. MgO C. NO2 D. SO3
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
